title: After-Action Report — Playoffs, Dynasty Development, and Supporting Fixes
scope: After Phase 1 + 2 + 3 produced a properly-distributed standings shape (see prior AARs) the user pivoted to two longer-term mechanics and a short list of operational fixes:

rationale.item: Playoffs were never built and were blocking everything that needed a "season-end" hook.

A dynasty model. The user wanted talent to start in true parity (no Elite+ outliers handed out at seed) and let elite talent emerge across multiple seasons, gated by team development infrastructure. Org_strength becomes the development-rate multiplier instead of the per-pitch multiplier (which was the bug we removed in Phase 1). Org_strength itself rolls year-over-year "like a stock or bond market".

Operational fixes that surfaced once the user actually tried to use the deployed app: match-day sweep "impossibly slow" (stuck at April 4); version footer printed "build dev" in production; new-league creation crashed with FOREIGN KEY constraint failed (race with multi-season runner background thread).

delegation_events.decision: Refuse to silently wait when the multi-season runner is active; surface an error instead
delegation_events.quote: Refusing to silently wait was the right call — the runner takes 10+ minutes per season.

delegation_events.decision: Field formula matched to user's spec
delegation_events.quote: Matches the user's spec exactly: 30-team → 9, 36-team → 12, 14-team single-div → 4 (floor).
**Best-of-N progression** (per the user's spec — 3/5/7/7), keyed off rounds-from-final:

delegation_events.decision: Cap at 80 at seed, but org_strength uncapped at 95
delegation_events.quote: The user's exact spec — "81-95 happens but it's a slow growth developmental improvement."
The user's spec ("30-team league: division champions and 3 wild cards") parses as a total field count.

delegation_events.decision: work_ethic / habits via μ shift, not a separate multiplier
delegation_events.quote: Rejected because the existing `today_condition` machinery already supports the exact shape we needed (gauss draw with a μ shift), and the user's spec was "boost attributes 1-5 points during a season" — folding into the μ shift gets us roughly that magnitude without touching prob.py at all.

The user noticed UT-tagged bench players kept showing up in places where canonical positions or jokers should — box scores read as "UT" instead of "backup CF", the FA browser was a UT-heavy soup, and the rest-day / habit-bench passes pulled UT bodies into canonical-position slots without typing the swap.

actions.description: Multi-season-runner guard: /new-league flashes a wait error and /api/season/reset returns HTTP 409 while the runner is active, fixing the FK-violation race
Version footer: app_version.sha + booted_at context processor; replaced subprocess git rev-parse with direct .git/HEAD read (loose ref or packed-refs); +dirty tag best-effort
Match-day waiver sweep rewrite: one bulk SELECT into in-memory buckets, pure-Python rounds, batched executemany writes; ~5 SQL statements per sweep instead of ~10K queries

Phase 4 postseason bracket + regular-season awards: field sizing formula, bye logic, best-of-N progression, incremental series scheduling, sim driver hooks, MVP/Cy Young/RoY/WS MVP awards, /playoffs UI route

Phase 5 cap-80 seed + multi-season development engine: seed attributes capped at 80, org_strength rolled uncapped at 95, development pass with age curves, org bonus, grit-modulated pitcher decline, bust events, org-strength bond-market roll, /api/season/advance dynasty rollover endpoint

Phase 5e work_ethic + work_habits with in-season habit_cup: 3 new players columns + migration, game-day μ integration, per-game cup updates, off-season soft re-rolls with age locks, player-page work_ethic display
Phase 5f manager-AI habit-bench pass: swaps slumping starters for similar-skill bench fielders with healthier cups, runs before the rest-day pass; thresholds scale with mgr_bench_usage
Phase 5g motivator-archetype cup-fill: per-game per-player dice roll on players_manager/iron_manager/fiery teams for +0.02 cup boost gated by grit, talent, last-10 form
Drop UT as a position: per-position bench layout in _DRAFT_SLOTS, _generate_draft_pool aggregation, _make_hitter UT short-circuit removed, waivers bucket slots rewritten

risk_posture: Behavior unchanged: same auto-policy (largest positive overall delta), same banking (single `picks_available` counter), same `is_active` reflag rule (top-N per bucket).
Both are idempotent — re-running won't dupe rows.
(That role was the bug we removed in Phase 1; not coming back.)
Backward-compat fallbacks ... are left in place. They won't fire on rosters seeded post-1e54168 and can be removed when no DB rows with UT exist.
League shape unchanged: `.367-.633` win-pct spread, consistent with prior smoke runs. The mechanism doesn't distort parity — it just tactically rotates within talent-similar bands.
Safety property: no permanent burial. The cup resets to 0.5 every off-season ... No bench-and-forget failure mode.

validation_claims.claim: Single sweep (50 claims): hung the sim before → 0.18s after; full 30-game season: jammed at 4/4 before → 21.5s for 210 games + 5 sweeps after
validation_claims.check_method: Re-run a seeded season sim and time the waiver sweep

validation_claims.claim: Smoke (14-team / 30-game): 17 playoff games, Athletics crowned in 6 (final 4-2). MVP Tavoy Moss 1.409 OPS / 51 RBI; CY Amier Guzman 4.58 ERA; WS MVP Jay Herrera 1.340 OPS
validation_claims.check_method: Re-run a 14-team smoke; exact players/values are seed-dependent

validation_claims.claim: Smoke (30-team / 30-game): 9-team field with 7 byes in WC round, 4-round bracket through bo7 final. Cubs (CHC) crowned over Orcas (VCO) 4-1
validation_claims.check_method: Re-run a 30-team smoke and inspect bracket structure

validation_claims.claim: Phase 5 smoke: all seed-time attributes ≤ 80; org_strength range 29-69; after offseason max hitter skill 83, max pitcher_skill 83; 14 teams + 266 free agents all developed
validation_claims.check_method: Seed a league and query player attribute maxima before/after run_offseason

validation_claims.claim: Phase 5e smoke: seed work_ethic range 20-80; post-season cup mean 0.555, σ 0.158, range 0.180-1.000; locks fire correctly; cup resets to 0.5 at off-season
validation_claims.check_method: Run season + offseason and query habit_cup / work_ethic distributions

validation_claims.claim: Phase 5f smoke: Kaliq Dawkins (cold cup) got 24 PA vs ~120 expected; benched ~26 of 30 games; hot-cup backups rotated in
validation_claims.check_method: Replicate the artificial cup-crash scenario and count PA

validation_claims.claim: Phase 5g smoke A/B: motivator teams mean cup 0.594 vs non-motivator 0.579 (+0.014); ~10% of player-games trigger a fill
validation_claims.check_method: Re-run A/B season with motivator vs set_and_forget managers

validation_claims.claim: UT-drop smoke: 0 players with UT position; canonical distribution correct; full season + playoffs in 25s; champion crowned (Astros); standings spread .233-.667
validation_claims.check_method: Seed a league post-1e54168 and query for position='UT'

validation_claims.claim: Org-strength bond-market roll smoke: WSN 29→36, MIL 65→51, CHW 69→57, VAN 59→65
validation_claims.check_method: Run a season-end org roll and inspect deltas vs W-L

non_actions.reason: Current v1 alternates home strictly — higher seed hosts odd games. ... Easy follow-up; just a scheduler change.
`season_archive` already persists most of this; needs a UI route.
if the user wants to re-run after fixing an aggregator bug, they'd have to clear `season_awards` rows by hand

non_actions.item: Multi-season-runner UX after the guard (surface multi_season_status on /league)
non_actions.reason: Right now you get flashed "wait for it to finish."

Phase 3's per-game variance already produces a healthy score-diff distribution ... Adding more variance on top of the new dynasty mechanics could over-correct toward soup. Will revisit if standings don't have enough texture after a multi-season run.

residual_risks: Backward-compat UT fallbacks left in place; can be removed when no DB rows with UT exist.
+dirty tag is best-effort — only runs when git is on PATH, which is dev-only.
When 2 leagues exist, the AL champ might still meet the NL champ in the final under chalk seeding — but it's not guaranteed by structure.
open_hooks: Season recap UI route on top of season_archive
Revisit variance widening after a multi-season run
section_headers_original: After-Action Report — Playoffs, Dynasty Development, and Supporting Fixes
5. Phase 5 — Cap-80 seed + multi-season development engine (`e20e1cc`)
unmapped_content: Branch: claude/fix-machine-limit-error-KtDSp. Builds on: aar-single-div-schedule-and-snake-draft.md (Phase 1) and aar-match-day-waivers-and-bad-day-variance.md (Phases 2 + 3). Extensive implementation detail retained in source: field formula (n_wild_cards = max(0, (team_count - 24) // 2); playoff_teams = max(4, ...)); bye logic; award eligibility formulas (MVP pa >= 3.1 × team_games; Cy Young outs >= 3.0 × team_games; RoY age ≤23 by max of OPS/0.800 and 4.0/ERA; WS MVP 4+ PA hitters / 9+ outs pitchers, pitchers on 1.6 - era/8.0); age-curve and org-bonus tables; bust events 1.5% per attribute N(-3,1.5); org roll formula new_org = 0.7×old + 0.3×50 + (winpct-0.5)×60 + N(0,3) clamped [20,95]; ethic/habits μ formulas and cup-update rules; habit-bench pseudocode and mgr_bench_usage threshold table (threshold = 0.15 + bench_usage × 0.30, required_delta = 0.40 − bench_usage × 0.20, skill_tolerance = 6.0); motivator chance formula (0.02 + 0.08×grit + 0.08×talent + 0.05×max(0,form), floor 2%, ceiling 23%, fill +0.02, participation-gated); per-position roster table totaling 47/team; full Files-touched table; decision-log entries on W-L excluding playoffs, bond-market α=0.30, bust per-attribute not per-player, snake-draft jitter ±6 stays, cup step ±0.04 over ±0.10, idle days don't move the cup (pa >= 2 hitters / outs >= 1 pitchers), soft 60/40 re-roll over full re-roll. Note: section numbering skips 8; section 6 ends with "What was deferred — actually, *not* deferred. See section 7 below. The manager-AI habit-bench pass shipped in `75b1b79` the same day."
parser_notes: Very long multi-workstream AAR (10 numbered build sections, numbering skips 8). Date from 'Date completed:' line. Slug shortened from full title; dropped 'dynasty' to match ~8-word guidance while staying deterministic from title words 'Playoffs ... Supporting Fixes' — used playoffs-dynasty-development-and-supporting-fixes.
